videos.title: HTML Document Structure - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Learn the essential structure of an HTML document including DOCTYPE, head, body, and proper nesting.

videos.title: Semantic HTML Tags - What They Are and How to Use Them
videos.description: A complete guide to semantic HTML5 elements including header, nav, main, article, section, aside, and footer.

videos.title: HTML5 Semantic Markup Tags & Layout
videos.description: Brad Traversy demonstrates how to use HTML5 semantic elements to create a proper page layout.

videos.title: Why You Should Use Semantic HTML
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains the importance of semantic HTML for accessibility, SEO, and maintainable code.

videos.title: The HTML Document Tree - How Browsers Read Your Code
videos.description: Understand how the browser parses HTML and builds the Document Object Model (DOM) tree.
